headline: Equinix Expands Fabric Geo Zones To Deepen AI And Compliance Moat
summary: Equinix (NasdaqGS:EQIX) has expanded its Fabric Geo Zones globally, extending network-level data sovereignty controls to more regions. The feature is designed to help enterprises keep data within defined geographic boundaries for AI and multicloud workloads in regulated industries. This development targets compliance needs in sectors such as finance, healthcare, and government that face strict data locality rules. For investors tracking Equinix at a share price of $1,065.06, this move adds...
